variables.notes: REVIEWED. Preferred direct line is 'Interest Expense', but it is blank in 2025 while 'Total Financial Expense' is populated. Added 'Total Financial Expense' as fallback because candidate list misses the broader finance-cost label needed for years where direct interest expense is unavailable. Excluded IFRS 16 lease-interest component as too narrow. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Total Financial Expense
